MODULE: cosmos.integration.external.discord_ext
FILE: cosmos/integration/external/discord_ext.py (65 lines)
CATEGORY: integration

DESCRIPTION: cosmos Discord Bridge - ChatOps Interface.

"Bringing the Professor to the server, one message at a time."

This module enables a full Discord bot interface for cosmos.

CLASSES:
- DiscordBridge
  Methods: async def start(self)
  Methods: async def send_message(self, channel_id: int, content: str)
